title: Oslo Fish Market Data Event
description: Canonical schema for fish market price ticks from Fish Pool Oslo, NASDAQ Commodities, and affiliated data providers. Published to Kafka topic: market.oslo.fish.prices

schema_version.description: Semantic version of this schema definition.

event_id.description: Globally unique UUIDv4 identifier. Consumer MUST deduplicate on this field.

event_type.description: Type discriminator for Kafka consumer routing.

timestamp.description: ISO 8601 timestamp of when the price tick was captured from the market feed.

source.description: Identifies the origin data provider and market context.

provider.description: The market data provider. INTERNAL_SIMULATION is used for development and testing.

feed_type.description: The pricing mechanism this tick represents.

market_session.description: The current trading phase of the market.

session_date.description: ISO 8601 date (YYYY-MM-DD) of the trading session this tick belongs to.

instrument.description: Defines the specific aquaculture commodity being priced.

species.description: Commercial fish species. Used as part of the Kafka composite partition key.

scientific_name.description: Binomial Latin species name for regulatory compliance.

product_form.description: Processing or preservation state of the fish product. Used as part of the Kafka composite partition key.

weight_class_kg.description: Standard market weight class range in kilograms per individual fish.

origin_country.description: ISO 3166-1 alpha-2 country code of farm origin. Common values: NO (Norway), CL (Chile), GB (UK), CA (Canada).

certification.description: List of active quality and sustainability certifications held by the lot. Empty array if none.

pricing.description: Current price data for the instrument. All monetary values carry 4 decimal places of precision.

currency.description: ISO 4217 currency code for all price fields in this object.

spot_price_per_kg.description: Current market spot price per kilogram. 4 decimal places.

bid_price_per_kg.description: Best available buy price per kilogram from active order book.

ask_price_per_kg.description: Best available sell price per kilogram from active order book.

spread_per_kg.description: Bid-ask spread per kilogram. Calculated as ask_price_per_kg - bid_price_per_kg.

daily_open_price.description: Price at market open for the current trading session.

daily_high_price.description: Highest price reached in the current trading session.

daily_low_price.description: Lowest price reached in the current trading session.

previous_close_price.description: Closing price from the previous trading session.

price_change_pct.description: Percentage change from previous_close_price to spot_price_per_kg. Formula: ((spot - prev_close) / prev_close) * 100. Can be negative.

volume_traded_kg.description: Total kilograms of this instrument traded in the current session up to the tick timestamp.

volume_traded_nok.description: Total monetary value traded (in NOK) in the current session up to the tick timestamp.

futures.description: Forward/futures contract pricing data, if available for this instrument.

available.description: Whether futures contracts are actively traded for this instrument.

contracts.description: List of active futures contract months. Empty array if available is false.

contract_month.description: Contract expiry month in YYYY-MM format.

settlement_price_per_kg.description: Current settlement/last traded price for this futures contract per kilogram.

open_interest_kg.description: Total outstanding open interest for this contract expressed in kilograms.

market_sentiment.description: Derived signals representing market conditions, analyst views, and news-based sentiment.

analyst_consensus.description: Aggregated analyst recommendation for this commodity.

supply_pressure_index.description: Normalized index (0–1) representing supply-side pressure. Higher values indicate excess supply and potential downward price pressure.

demand_pressure_index.description: Normalized index (0–1) representing demand-side pressure. Higher values indicate strong buying interest.

news_sentiment_score.description: NLP-derived sentiment score from recent industry news. -1.0 = extremely negative, 0 = neutral, +1.0 = extremely positive.

regulatory.description: Quota and export restriction data relevant to this instrument's origin.

weekly_quota_remaining_tons.description: Remaining catch or production quota for the current week in metric tons. Null if quota data is unavailable.

quota_utilization_pct.description: Percentage of the weekly quota that has been consumed. Null if quota data is unavailable.

active_export_restrictions.description: List of currently active export restriction or sanction codes affecting this instrument. Empty array [] if no restrictions apply.

restriction_code.description: Official regulation or sanction code reference.

target_country.description: ISO 3166-1 alpha-2 code of the country affected by the restriction.
